title: Travel — Houston / Kentucky / Idaho / DC trip retrospectives (2023)
html:
Travel — Houston / Kentucky / Idaho / DC trip retrospectives (2023)

Source: 2023-05-13 Apple Note. 5-trip retrospective — Yahir doing personal AAR (after-action review) on his recent travel run.

TL;DR

  • Houston trip: missed first flight (gate change), got hit $99 trying to finesse carryon, then a "lovely lady" let him through. Lesson: can't finesse carryon, check gates every 30 min, bring portable charger (planes don't have plugins), bring snacks.
  • Kentucky trip: clutch ride from Jay to Eugene; couldn't find UFC at any bar so ate at "a dirt ass Chinese restaurant"; Jipp broke camera leaving it on top of car.
  • Idaho trip: surprise-Andrew-pickup; Riley had no idea Lalo was supposed to come; 2-day round trip, "alot of driving but a great memory."
  • Washington DC trip: clutched public transport to hostel; first morning leg was itchy from bug bites or allergic reaction.
  • Jordan / Israel / Egypt: deferred to journal entry — meaning the AAR wasn't fast enough; that trip earned its own dedicated handling (see 2023 09 06 egypt jordan jerusalem itinerary).
  • AAR genre: this is the rare retrospective-format note in Yahir's corpus; mostly his travel notes are forward-planning or in-the-moment. Worth flagging the genre.
